item.title: Why We Feel a Problem Is Hard
item.description: When we perceive a problem as difficult, this hardness can be attributed to various factors. It’s essential to demystify the concept and develop a more precise and shared understanding of it. Here are some factors that contribute to the difficulty of a problem: Hidden and implicit information: Critical information required for solving the problem may be missing, and you need to identify what that information is. This often requires adopting a different perspective from your normal view.
